title: Day 45 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - しょうがくせいの　とき、　はじめました。= I started when I was in elementary school.

Sentence 2 - ひまな　とき、　いつも　ひいて　います。= I always play when I'm free.

Sentence 3 - さびしい　とき、　ギターを　ひくと　げんきに　なります。= When I feel lonely, I play the guitar and I feel good.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
